description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Template that accepts board, max_size, max_size_apa102, and extra_args as inputs. The workflow runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, installs Python 3.11 and uv, and performs a series of compiled program size checks and binary inspections for the provided board and APA102 configurations. It also generates a timestamp and random hex, uploads the build log as an artifact, and fails the workflow if the build status is not successful.
